groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, aquarium_then_vehicle direction, random ordering #0.

sentences.text: The hotel lobby displayed a floor-to-ceiling tank stocked with graceful moon jellyfish and soft blue lighting.

The hotel lobby displayed a floor-to-ceiling tank stocked with graceful moon jellyfish and soft blue lighting. He carefully scraped the algae off the inner walls of the tank with a magnetic cleaning tool.

The hotel lobby displayed a floor-to-ceiling tank stocked with graceful moon jellyfish and soft blue lighting. He carefully scraped the algae off the inner walls of the tank with a magnetic cleaning tool. LED fixtures with adjustable spectrum settings allow hobbyists to simulate sunrise and sunset over the tank.

The hotel lobby displayed a floor-to-ceiling tank stocked with graceful moon jellyfish and soft blue lighting. He carefully scraped the algae off the inner walls of the tank with a magnetic cleaning tool. LED fixtures with adjustable spectrum settings allow hobbyists to simulate sunrise and sunset over the tank. Weekly water changes of ten to fifteen percent keep nitrate concentrations low in any planted tank.

The hotel lobby displayed a floor-to-ceiling tank stocked with graceful moon jellyfish and soft blue lighting. He carefully scraped the algae off the inner walls of the tank with a magnetic cleaning tool. LED fixtures with adjustable spectrum settings allow hobbyists to simulate sunrise and sunset over the tank. Weekly water changes of ten to fifteen percent keep nitrate concentrations low in any planted tank. Three layers of substrate lined the bottom of the planted tank to encourage healthy root growth.

A small octopus squeezed through a gap in the rocks inside the research tank and startled the intern.
